gcp.saasservicemgmt.projects.locations.l.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service. This method can be called in two ways: * **List all public locations:** Use the path `GET /v1/locations`. * **List project-visible loc

required.description: The resource that owns the locations collection, if applicable.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()
